# X3 Chain Starter: Substrate SDK iOS

## Upstream

- <https://github.com/novasamatech/substrate-sdk-ios/tree/master/Example>

## Goal

Bootstrap native Swift iOS integration for X3 Chain.

## Checklist

1. Pull iOS example baseline and pin commit/tag.
2. Configure X3 Chain RPC/network metadata.
3. Add account lifecycle and signing flows.
4. Add transaction submit + status polling.
5. Add regression test scenarios for key wallet actions.
